headline: Cognizant Neuro AI Trust delivers real-time assurance for enterprises scaling AI at speed
summary: Cognizant (Nasdaq: CTSH) today announced Cognizant Neuro® AI Trust, a new platform designed to provide enterprises with continuous governance and real-time assurance across all AI systems. As AI environments grow more autonomous and complex, Neuro AI Trust empowers enterprises to monitor, manage and help control AI behavior and performance in real time, aiming to enable organizations to scale AI with confidence.

headline: Cognizant Schedules Second Quarter 2026 Earnings Release and Conference Call
summary: Cognizant (Nasdaq: CTSH), a leading AI builder and technology services provider, will announce results for the second quarter of 2026 on Wednesday, July 29, 2026 before market open.
